summary: Senior backend engineer with 6 years of Python, FastAPI, and Postgres experience. Comfortable owning async services end-to-end and mentoring mid-level engineers.

highlights: Rewrote sync request stack to asyncio, achieved 40% p99 latency drop.
Owned the billing-events service from design through SLO ramp.
Mentored two mid-level engineers through promotion.
Built a fan-out notifications pipeline on Redis Streams.
Cut Postgres write contention with advisory locks during a hot migration.

projects.name: AsyncAPI
projects.description: Internal high-throughput API gateway sitting in front of legacy services; routes 8k req/s on a 3-node cluster.

projects.name: Billing-Events
projects.description: At-least-once event delivery service with idempotency keys, used by the finance team to reconcile invoices.
